results.title: Belarus to introduce 20-25 new AI standards in 2026
results.description: Belarus will introduce 20-25 new standards in artificial intelligence by the end of the year, First Deputy Chairman of the State Committee for Standardization of Belarus (Gosstandart) Aleksandr Burak told BelTA.
